title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCC. Lullabies.
content:
[From Yorkshire and Essex. A nursery-cry. - It is also sometimes sung in the streets by boys who have small figures of wool, wood, or gypsum, & c. of lambs to sell.]

                Young Lambs to sell!
                Young Lambs to sell!
        If I'd as much money as I can tell,
        I never would cry - Young Lambs to sell!
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CCCC. Lullabies." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
